ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, car, bus) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "gps_device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GPS device installed in the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Ford, Toyota) */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., F-150, Corolla) */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses (e.g., diesel, gasoline, electric) */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle in miles per gallon (MPG) or kilometers per liter (KPL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_gps_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("gps_device_id") REFERENCES gps_devices ("gps_device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_devices" (
  "gps_device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the GPS device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the GPS device was installed in the vehicle */,
  "device_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the GPS device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the GPS device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the GPS device */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the device */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that took the route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the route */,
  "planned_start_time" TEXT /* Planned start time of the route */,
  "planned_end_time" TEXT /* Planned end time of the route */,
  "actual_start_time" TEXT /* Actual start time of the route */,
  "actual_end_time" TEXT /* Actual end time of the route */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_points" (
  "route_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route point */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route that the point belongs to */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the route point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the route point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle passed the point */,
  "speed_at_point" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the route point */,
  "distance_from_start" REAL /* Cumulative distance from the start of the route to the point */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the route point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_points_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_segments" (
  "route_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route segment */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route that the segment belongs to */,
  "start_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting point of the segment */,
  "end_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending point of the segment */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the segment */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of the vehicle during the segment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle started the segment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle completed the segment */,
  "fuel_consumed" REAL /* Amount of fuel consumed during the segment */,
  "segment_status" TEXT /* Status of the segment (e.g., planned, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_segments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "driver_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "driver_email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  "driver_rating" REAL /* Rating given to the driver based on performance */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was assigned to the vehicle */,
  "unassignment_date" TEXT /* Date the driver was unassigned from the vehicle */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, dispatcher, driver) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for secure storage */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., deviation from route, speeding) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the trip */,
  "fuel_consumed" REAL /* Total amount of fuel consumed during the trip */,
  "idle_time" INTEGER /* Total idle time during the trip */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who operated the vehicle */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route at the end of the trip (e.g., completed, incomplete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)
